title: Egyptian Lamb Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy Egyptian-inspired lamb wrap, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together chopped lamb, mildly spicy sauce, garlic, and lemon juice.
2. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the lamb mixture for 5-7 minutes, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
3. Warm the Egyptian pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven at 375°F (190°C) for 5-7 minutes.
4. Assemble the wraps by spreading a spoonful of the lamb mixture onto each pita bread, followed by cucumber, red onion, tomato, and parsley.

6. To make the mildly spicy sauce, combine 1/2 cup mayonnaise, 1/4 cup plain Greek yogurt, 1 tablespoon sriracha sauce, and 1 teaspoon lemon juice in a bowl. Mix well and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before using.
7. If using a pre-made mildly spicy sauce, skip steps 6 and use 1/4 cup in the lamb mixture instead.
8. To ensure food safety, cook the lamb to an internal temperature of at least 145°F (63°C).
